name: Neewer TL96 RGB Magnetic Handheld Light Stick
description: Delivering color is the prime directive of the Neewer TL96 RGB Magnetic Handheld Light Stick. Running on a rechargeable battery, the 4.3 x 1.6 x 1.7" fixture can be handheld or hidden anywhere for an accent light or to open up shadows.

features.Key Features:: Measures 4.3 x 1.6 x 1.7"| 96 LEDs | 2500-8500K | CRI: 97+ | RGB Mode: Millions of Custom Colors | Runs on Battery Power
features.What’s in the box?: 1 x RGB Light Stick | 1 x USB Cable | 1 x Instruction Manual
